description: Enable the SSL website feature for the virtual server 'acmecorp.test' and generate a self-signed SSL certificate using the Virtualmin web interface (https://localhost:10000). The certificate must use the following organizational details: Organization Name: Acme Corporation, Organizational Unit: Web Services, City/Locality: San Francisco, State/Province: California, Country Code: US, and a Validity Period of 365 days. Ensure the website is accessible over HTTPS after configuration. Login credentials: root / GymAnything123!
